statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

editorial.title: Max Heapify
editorial.intuition: To fix max heapify logic consider swapping each element with its max child
editorial.optimalSolution: Max heapify logic must be recursive with swapping child and parent until heap condition is met
